examples: Religious values can often differ greatly from humanistic morals.
It turned from God and the authority of the Roman Catholic Church and instead favored a more humanistic approach to being.
Humanistic disciplines are seriously underfunded, not just by the government and the foundations but by academic institutions themselves.
It is important to manage the situation in a professional, humanistic and legally compliant manner.
And you can't separate technology from the humanistic and spiritual content of a building.
